title: MuslinZ 12PK 100% Pure Cotton Baby Muslin Squares 70x70cms - Blue
features: MuslinZ Brand Pack of 12 Blue premium quality muslin squares/wraps approximately 70cm x 70cm
Made from 100% Cotton, excellent quality. Breathable, durable and quick to dry
Use as a newborn nappy, burp cloth, cover up when breastfeeding, changing mat cover, dribble catcher, comforter and so much more! A baby essential item
Machine washable 40°C We recommend you wash before first use. This will increase the softness and absorbency. The more you wash the softer they get!
UK Brand. Every product we sell has been ethically made to meet highest quality standards, made in an ISO and OKEO TEX certified factory
description: Product Description Designed in the UK At MuslinZ we found that the muslin squares available were lacking in quality so we decided to design our own. Our muslin's are well known for good quality in the UK and worldwide. Our Classic Muslin Square Essential for all parents and their babies. MuslinZ muslin squares are designed with quality in mind which makes them perfect to use and look great wash after wash. The many features of the MuslinZ muslin are: Machine Washable at 40c - Wash before use Extremely Soft - the more you wash them the softer they get Maintains Shape and Texture - due to the quality fabric Fine Weave - for excellent absorbency and so they are not see through for using as a cover up when feeding 70x70 cm Sizing - a great size for so many uses MuslinZ 12 Pack Multi Purpose Muslin Squares Our classic 100% cotton muslins can be used as newborn reusable cloth nappies, covers for breast feeding, burp cloths, changing mat covers, newborn swaddles and baby comforters MuslinZ Reusable Cloth Nappy Bundle, Size 2 (Approx 6m-Potty), 2 x PUL Wrap/C... MuslinZ Baby Muslin Squares, Soft, Breathable and Absorbent Newborn Receiving...
